code:
%%{Infra_EtcdCluster}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
title: SM-09.01 — Knowledge Ingestion Pipeline (Infra_LoadBalancer)

[Infra_IngressController] --> DISCOVER : SourceDiscovered
note right of DISCOVER
  Discover new sources:
  • hub/project outputs, repos, web docs, datasets
  • governance & treasury artifacts
  • manual submissions or connectors
end note

DISCOVER --> INGEST : SourceSelected
note right of INGEST
  Fetch & stage raw content (Infra_LoadBalancer)
  • capture provenance (Infra_EtcdCluster)
  • store raw blob refs for audit
end note

INGEST --> PARSE : SourceFetched
note right of PARSE
  Content extraction & normalization
  • text, tables, code blocks, media metadata
  • language detect, mime routing
end note

PARSE --> DEDUP : Parsed
note right of DEDUP
  De-duplication & canonicalization
  • simhash/LSH near-duplicate checks
  • keep canonical doc id
end note

DEDUP --> ENTITY_LINK : Deduped
note right of ENTITY_LINK
  NER + entity resolution:
  • link to DID, project, hub, proposal, stream
  • add typed edges with confidences
end note

ENTITY_LINK --> EMBED : EntitiesLinked
note right of EMBED
  Embedding & feature generation:
  • domain-specific models
  • chunking + vector store write
end note

EMBED --> INTEGRATE : EmbeddingGenerated
note right of INTEGRATE
  Integrate into graph:
  • apply ontology constraints
  • validate schemas & ids
end note

INTEGRATE --> SYNTH : Integrated
note right of SYNTH
  Synthesis:
  • summaries, explanations, citations
  • produce derived notes & insights
end note

SYNTH --> PUBLISH : KnowledgeUpdated
note right of PUBLISH
  Publish to consumers:
  • Metrics (Infra_WorkerNode), UI (Infra_EtcdCluster), API (Infra_EtcdCluster)
  • expose search/RAG endpoints
end note

PUBLISH --> [Infra_WorkerNode] : Published

%% ---- Quality review & human-in-the-loop ----
EMBED --> REVIEW : LowConfidence / DriftDetected
ENTITY_LINK --> REVIEW : AmbiguousLink
REVIEW --> EMBED : ReEmbed
REVIEW --> ENTITY_LINK : FixLinking
REVIEW --> REJECTED : NotRelevant
REJECTED --> [Infra_RedisCache]

%% ---- Failure & recovery paths ----
INGEST --> FAILED : FetchError / AuthError
PARSE --> FAILED : ExtractError / UnsupportedFormat
INTEGRATE --> FAILED : SchemaMismatch / ConstraintViolation
FAILED --> [Infra_WorkerNode] : IngestionFailed

%% ---- Maintenance / indexing ----
PUBLISH --> UPDATE_INDEX : BuildIndexes
UPDATE_INDEX --> [Infra_IngressController] : IndexReady

%% ===== Styling =====
classDef core fill:#ff8b00,stroke:#333,color:#fff,font-weight:bold;
class DISCOVER,INGEST,PARSE,DEDUP,ENTITY_LINK,EMBED,INTEGRATE,SYNTH,PUBLISH,REVIEW,REJECTED,FAILED,UPDATE_INDEX core;
repo_description: The cohersphere architecture — structural blueprint of the resonance network. Defines the modular layers connecting app, API, and governance protocols. Outlines data flows for Proof-of-Contribution, c

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要设计一个知识摄入管道的状态图，从数据源发现一直到最终发布。整个流程要经过发现、摄取、解析、去重、实体链接、嵌入、集成、合成、发布这九个核心阶段。每个阶段都要能回环到人工审核，还要有失败恢复机制。
明白，这是一个典型的数据管道工作流。我想确认一下触发点：是由Infra_IngressController来发起源发现吗？还有，摄取阶段提到的Infra_LoadBalancer和Infra_EtcdCluster分别承担什么角色？
对，IngressController负责监听外部事件来触发DISCOVER。LoadBalancer在INGEST阶段做流量调度，EtcdCluster则用来存储来源 provenance 和审计用的原始blob引用。这样即使后面处理失败，我们也能追溯。
好的，我先画出主干流程。从IngressController进入DISCOVER，然后INGEST、PARSE、DEDUP、ENTITY_LINK、EMBED、INTEGRATE、SYNTH，最后PUBLISH到WorkerNode。每个状态转换我都标注了触发事件，比如SourceSelected、Parsed、EntitiesLinked这些。
主干看起来对。现在需要加上人工审核的旁路。当EMBED阶段检测到置信度低或者数据漂移，或者ENTITY_LINK遇到模糊链接时，都要能进入REVIEW状态。审核通过可以重新嵌入或修正链接，不通过则直接拒绝到RedisCache。
收到，REVIEW作为汇合点，从EMBED和ENTITY_LINK都能进入。然后REVIEW分出三条出路：ReEmbed回EMBED、FixLinking回ENTITY_LINK、NotRelevant到REJECTED，最后REJECTED落到RedisCache。这样设计可以吗？
没错。还有失败处理路径：INGEST阶段可能遇到FetchError或AuthError，PARSE阶段可能有ExtractError或不支持的格式，INTEGRATE阶段会有SchemaMismatch。这些都要汇聚到FAILED状态，最终通知WorkerNode。
失败路径已添加。另外我注意到PUBLISH之后应该有个索引更新环节，完成后回到IngressController表示可以接收下一轮发现。我加了一个UPDATE_INDEX状态，从PUBLISH触发BuildIndexes，完成后IndexReady回到IngressController。
UPDATE_INDEX这个设计很好。不过PUBLISH的输出目标我需要再明确一下：除了WorkerNode，还要同时给UI和API层，后两者都依赖EtcdCluster。另外，嵌入阶段要强调是领域特定模型，不是通用embedding。
我调整一下PUBLISH的note说明，明确Metrics走WorkerNode，UI和API都走EtcdCluster。EMBED的note也补充了domain-specific models和chunking+vector store的细节。还有，所有核心状态我统一用了橙色填充的样式，方便视觉区分。
ENTITY_LINK到REVIEW的触发条件应该是AmbiguousLink，不是LowConfidence——后者是EMBED的。还有，REVIEW到ENTITY_LINK的返回应该是FixLinking，不是FixEmbedding。
已修正。ENTITY_LINK--REVIEW标注为AmbiguousLink，REVIEW--ENTITY_LINK标注为FixLinking。EMBED--REVIEW保持LowConfidence/DriftDetected，REVIEW--EMBED保持ReEmbed。现在逻辑一致了。
完美。整个管道覆盖了从源发现到知识发布的完整生命周期，人工审核和失败恢复都考虑到了，索引更新也形成了闭环。这个状态图可以直接作为SM-09.01的设计文档了。
